title: switch polly workflows default model to glm
author: Itachi-1824

gist.headline: Polly gets a new brain
gist.blurb: We've updated our internal GitHub workflows to use the GLM model for Polly's auto-fix and PR assistant features. Just a quick tune-up to keep our automated helper buzzing along smoothly!
gist.summary: Updated the default model for Polly's GitHub Action workflows from claude-large to glm.
gist.impact: Internal automation for issue auto-fixing and PR assistance will now be powered by the GLM model.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee and the Monitor Robot upgrading a server rack by inserting a new glowing 'GLM' cartridge, representing the model switch in the GitHub workflows.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee mascot and a chunky Monitor Robot swapping a glowing lime green (#ecf874) 'GLM' cartridge into a retro server rack. Soft pastel lavender and cream gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
